title: 2 Pieces Champagne Stopper, Stainless Steel Vacuum Sealed Wine Sparkling Bottle Closure Sealer Silver
features: 1.Each of the Champagne Stoppers is made of tough stainless steel material, and rust-resistant
2.The Champagne Stoppers are great for barware accessory, and an essential addition for your kitchen and home bar
3.The Champagne Stoppers are easy to clean and can be reused, to keep your unfinished champagne or wine sealed
4.The wine stopper clamps are tight to an unfinished bottle of wine(especially champagne) to better maintain flavor and freshness
5.You can simply pull the stopper onto the bottle to form a tight vacuum seal, and push the button to remove it, very convenient to use
description: Product Description Why Use Champagne Stopper Our champagne bottle stoppers are the best choice to keep champagne fresh and full of bubbles.It keeps the beverage or liquid in the bottles fresh longer than traditional corks by preventing unwanted odors and air bubbles from seeping in and spoiling what's inside. Great Material The Champagne Stoppers are made of tough stainless steel material, and rust-resistant, easy to clean and can be reused, to keep your unfinished champagne or wine sealed Easy to Use You can simply pull the stopper onto the bottle to form a tight vacuum seal, and push the button to remove it, very convenient to use Great Gift It is a great gift for Birthday Parties, Thanksgiving, Christmas, Holiday Parties, Housewarming, Graduation Ceremonies, Weddings, Valentine's Day or other celebrations. Makes your Champagne Fresh The wine stopper clamps are tight to an unfinished bottle of wine(especially champagne) to better maintain flavor and freshness Wide Application The Champagne Stoppers are great for barware accessory, and an essential addition for your kitchen and home bar 2 Pcs Rose Gold Champagne Stopper 2 Pcs Golden Champagne Stopper 2 Pcs Rose gold&Gold Champagne Stopper 5 Pcs Mixed Bottle Stoppers 3 Pcs Heart Shaped Wine Stopper Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.2 out of 5 stars 168 4.6 out of 5 stars 6 5.0 out of 5 stars 7 — — Quantity 2 2 2 5 3 type Double Buckle Stopper Double Buckle Stopper Double Buckle Stopper Hybrid Bottle Stopper Heart Shaped Stopper
